title: Progressive shortness of breath with swelling
patientBrief: Shortness of breath when lying flat and leg swelling over several weeks.
openingComplaint: I've been getting more out of breath lately, and my legs have been swelling.
authorNote: This is a classic heart failure presentation. Mention needing extra pillows only if asked about sleep or lying down.

symptoms: progressive shortness of breath over several weeks
wakes up short of breath at night
history: had a heart attack several years ago
